subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy detailed letter was read and chanted, and brought the utmost joy and spiritual delight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مفصل تلاوت و مرتل گردید و نهایت روح و ریحان حاصل شد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @spiritual transformation
